title: Strong Thesis Verdict: Local vs Global Parameters

content.finding: Strong thesis (adaptation from computation, not external signal) holds for per-cell parameters (alpha), FAILS for global shared parameters (beta/gamma)
content.evidence: Alpha adapts locally via intrinsic resp_z. Beta/gamma require global MI (extrinsic). Structural impossibility: 2 global scalars have no local decomposition
implications: Frozen frame floor may be >0 for global coupling parameters
Architecture change may be required to eliminate global params
